indicators.label: Policy Expectations Proxy: 2Y-Fed Funds Spread
indicators.error: No Treasury yield curve cache files found
indicators.fallback: Fed Funds or SOFR futures implied path if a stable history source is added.
indicators.note: Proxy only; 2Y Treasury yield minus Fed Funds rate reflects policy-cycle expectations, not CME FedWatch meeting probabilities.

indicators.label: US Dollar Index Proxy

indicators.label: ISM Manufacturing PMI

adapter_meta.source_name: Jin10 datacenter / 美国ISM制造业PMI报告
adapter_meta.gap: Third-party public economic-calendar feed; replace with NBS/AKShare official-source adapter when available.

indicators.fallback: ISM report or FRED NAPM if accessible.
indicators.note: Manufacturing cycle; 50 separates expansion and contraction. Jin10 all.js cache currently seeds history and latest API can refresh when reachable.

indicators.label: ISM Services PMI

adapter_meta.source_name: Jin10 datacenter / 美国ISM非制造业PMI报告
adapter_meta.gap: Third-party public economic-calendar feed; replace with NBS/AKShare official-source adapter when available.

indicators.note: Services-cycle read for the dominant part of US activity. Jin10 all.js cache currently seeds history and latest API can refresh when reachable.

indicators.label: Core CPI
indicators.note: Sticky inflation read excluding food and energy.

indicators.label: S&P 500 Valuation Proxy
indicators.configured_source: FRED / BEA NIPA corporate profits derived proxy

adapter_meta.gap: Proxy only. Uses S&P 500 index divided by NIPA after-tax corporate profits; not analyst-consensus forward P/E.

indicators.fallback: Shiller CAPE, trailing P/E, or licensed forward P/E if available.
indicators.note: Proxy only; S&P 500 index divided by NIPA after-tax corporate profits, not analyst-consensus forward P/E.

indicators.label: Earnings Cycle Proxy: Corporate Profits YoY

adapter_meta.source_name: FRED / BEA NIPA corporate profits after tax
adapter_meta.gap: Proxy only. Uses NIPA after-tax corporate profits YoY; not analyst-consensus S&P 500 EPS growth.

indicators.fallback: trailing S&P 500 EPS YoY or licensed consensus EPS growth if available.
indicators.note: Proxy only; NIPA after-tax corporate profits YoY, not S&P 500 analyst EPS growth.

indicators.label: Fixed Asset Investment YoY
indicators.note: Total investment trend; split into manufacturing, infrastructure, and real estate later.

indicators.label: 70-City Home Price Index
indicators.note: Home-price trend; methodology changes should be documented.

indicators.fallback: NBS data table extract; macropage CPI MoM chain if YoY unavailable.
indicators.note: Household inflation and demand pressure; FRED/OECD mirror used for v1.

indicators.note: Industrial price cycle and profit pressure; v1 derives YoY from PPI MoM chain and must be labeled as derived.

indicators.note: RMB pressure and USD liquidity transmission.

indicators.note: Uses ECB deposit facility rate as the v1 policy-rate proxy.

indicators.label: EUR/USD
indicators.note: Major DXY component and global USD condition input.

indicators.note: Use ETF proxy for free v1.

indicators.label: BTC Price Trend

adapter_meta.gap: Hyperliquid perpetual daily close; venue-level perp price, not a consolidated spot index.

indicators.note: Use weekly trend and moving averages for long-horizon context.

indicators.label: BTC Dominance

adapter_meta.gap: Free endpoint provides latest dominance only; historical dominance needs derived market-cap history.

indicators.fallback: Coinlore latest-only global endpoint; derive history from BTC market cap divided by total crypto market cap only if both are sourced consistently.
indicators.note: Crypto internal risk-appetite indicator; free fallback may be latest-only.

ETH.gap: Hyperliquid perpetual daily close; venue-level perp price, not a consolidated spot index.

BTC.gap: Hyperliquid perpetual daily close; venue-level perp price, not a consolidated spot index.

adapter_meta.gap: Derived from Hyperliquid ETH and BTC perpetual daily closes; not a consolidated spot ETH/BTC index.

indicators.label: Stablecoin Supply

adapter_meta.gap: DeFiLlama all-stablecoin circulating USD-pegged supply history; methodology may revise historical chain/asset classification.

indicators.fallback: major stablecoin market caps from CoinGecko

indicators.label: Crypto Funding Rate

adapter_meta.gap: Venue-level BTC/ETH/SOL average, not whole-market aggregate.

indicators.fallback: Use BTC, ETH, SOL venue-level funding and label as non-aggregate.
indicators.note: Long-horizon crowding, not a standalone trading signal.

indicators.label: Crypto Open Interest

adapter_meta.gap: Latest venue-level notional OI for BTC/ETH/SOL only, not whole-market aggregate.

indicators.fallback: Use single-venue OI; label whole-market aggregate as missing if unavailable.
indicators.note: Do not replace with unrelated leverage proxies.

indicators.label: DeFi TVL
indicators.note: Chain activity and risk-capital proxy; always show TVL methodology caveat.
